scripts.db:create: wrangler d1 execute prompyai-telemetry --remote --command "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS events (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, event TEXT NOT NULL, version TEXT, machine_id TEXT, timestamp INTEGER, properties TEXT, received_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')))"
scripts.db:stats: wrangler d1 execute prompyai-telemetry --remote --command "SELECT machine_id, COUNT(*) as calls, COUNT(DISTINCT event) as event_types FROM events WHERE received_at > datetime('now', '-24 hours') GROUP BY machine_id"
